Amended Notice And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Pltf Pursuant To Ccp 2025.450 And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Arthur Lowe and Lakeside Dental Care's Motion to compel deposition of plaintiff pursuant to CCP 2025.450; and request for monetary sanctions granted:
1. Plaintiff shall appear and testify at her deposition, which shall commence not later than September 25, 2009;
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $790.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this judgment. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION (Re-Notice Of)For Undertaking Of Nonresident Pursuant To Ccp Sections 1030
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARTHUR LOWE, and, LAKESIDE DENTAL CARE'S MOTION (Re-Notice Of) For Undertaking of Nonresident pursuant to CCP section 1030. Appearances: Terence O'Connell Mayo, Esq. of Mayo & Mayo (415) 397-1515, making a telephonic appearance, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Mary M. Sackett, Esq. of The Goldman Law Firm (415) 435-5500, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Inadequate showing of reasonable possibility of prevailing. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Form of Order. (302PHA/XLT) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
